mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_result_revision ( order_id, result_id, user_id, lawyer_id, revision_no, content, status ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{resultId}, #{userId}, #{lawyerId}, #{revisionNo}, #{content}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_result_revision WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status IN (0, 1)
SELECT id, order_id, result_id, user_id, lawyer_id, revision_no, content, status, created_at, handled_at FROM service_result_revision WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE service_result_revision SET status = 1, handled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 0
